hero.title: Transform your organization.
hero.subtitle: Sirius Teranga Consulting supports companies in their organizational and digital transformation, with expertise, method and commitment.

about.title: A strategic partner
about.p1: Sirius Teranga Consulting (STC) is a consulting firm specialized in organizational optimization, digital transformation and improving business performance.
about.p2: We work with organizations of all sizes to help them structure, modernize and optimize their processes to achieve their strategic objectives.
about.highlight1_desc: Experienced consultants with a global and local vision.
about.highlight2_desc: An approach focused on measurable and sustainable deliverables.
about.desc: STC works with companies to improve their efficiency, strengthen their organization and support their growth through solutions tailored to their challenges.

mission.title: Mission · Vision ·
mission.subtitle: The foundations that guide each of our interventions.
mission.mission_text: Help organizations optimize their performance through tailored, rigorous and results-oriented consulting solutions.
mission.vision_text: Become the leading consulting firm in Africa, recognized for its excellence, innovation and the sustainability of its results.

services.title: Our
services.subtitle: Tailored consulting solutions for every organizational and digital challenge.

org.title: Organizational Consulting
org.desc: Restructuring, governance, optimization of structures and human resources for a more agile and efficient organization.

digital.title: Digital Transformation
digital.desc: Support in digitizing processes, adopting new technologies and the associated cultural change.

si.title: Information Systems
si.desc: Audit, mapping and optimization of IS, selection of suitable tools and management of enterprise IT projects.

process.title: Process Optimization
process.desc: Analysis and redesign of business processes to eliminate inefficiencies, reduce costs and improve quality.

training.title: Professional Training
training.desc: Custom training programs to develop managerial, digital and technical skills of your teams.

iso.title: ISO & Quality (QMS)
iso.desc: Support towards ISO certifications, implementation of quality management systems.

services.cta_desc: Let's discuss your challenges together and co-build a solution tailored to your needs.

methodology.title: Our
methodology.subtitle: A proven, rigorous and results-oriented methodology.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.desc: In-depth diagnosis of your organization, identifying challenges and opportunities for improvement.

structure.title: Structure
structure.desc: Design of a clear, prioritized transformation plan aligned with your strategic objectives.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.desc: Implementation of solutions, team training and continuous adjustment to maximize performance.

transform.title: Transform
transform.desc: Embedding changes in corporate culture and support towards sustainable performance.

whyus.title: What makes us
whyus.desc: We don't offer generic solutions. Each intervention is unique, built around your reality and ambitions.

expertise.title: Strategic Expertise
expertise.desc: Senior consultants with deep knowledge of African and international challenges.

results.title: Concrete & Measurable Results
results.desc: We commit to clear indicators and rigorously monitor their achievement.

solutions.title: Tailored Solutions
solutions.desc: No copy-paste. Each solution is designed specifically for your context.

method.title: Proven Methodology
method.desc: A rigorous intervention framework, tested on over 150 projects across different sectors.

cta.title: Ready to transform
cta.subtitle: Our experts are available to analyze your situation and propose solutions adapted to your context.
